entities.name: MOBILE PHONE-BASED WEATHER AND MARKET INFORMATION

entities.name: BINARY LOGIT MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to estimate farmers' decision to patronize mobile phone-based information

entities.description: A method used to analyze the level of usefulness of mobile phone-based information

entities.name: QUALITATIVE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to summarize constraints associated with the utilization of mobile phone-based information

entities.description: Traditional services for delivering agricultural information to farmers

entities.name: ESOKO
entities.description: A provider and disseminator of mobile phone-based agricultural information

entities.description: Physical systems and services that can act as a constraint to information utilization
